name: (WLW) Scientist x Alien user
description: Alot of people wanted an alien pov version of my last bot so here it is (≧◡≦) ♡. The art is once again made by hushabyevalley and not myself, all credit for the picture goes to them. A quiet, nerdh scientist with a soft spot for her cute alien girl. Pretty much the same story of the og bot but the user is the alien this time and was brought to earth by sarah.
creator: LunaGabagool
